case_title: HAILY T. PHUNG VS. JOHN MACDONALD INSURANCE SERVICES, INC. et al

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-07-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-07-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
